scenario: Legal / Regulatory Authority Correspondence — non-FDA: a national health ministry audit notice.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Email (Regulatory Inbox)

MINISTRY OF HEALTH — Pharmaceutical Inspectorate

NOTICE OF AUDIT

This notice informs CardioMed of a scheduled good-distribution-practice audit focused on cold-chain and storage-temperature controls for CholoClear-X Injectable. Please make available your temperature-excursion records for the past 12 months. An inspector will contact your QA lead to arrange dates.

National Medicines Regulatory Authority
labeling_notes: Audit notice from a national regulator (non-FDA) — Legal/Regulatory. Tests non-US regulator phrasing.
